title: The Written Block
description: Writing your way through it all
body:
The written word is one of the most essential elements in human history, connecting people around the world across time and space, and it is now available in Minecraft. You get to write on 5 types of stone with all 26 letters of the alphabet, and many more are on the way.

V 0.1.0:
-26 Letters on Stone
-26 Letters on Sandstone
-26 Letters on Andesite
-26 Letters on Granite
-26 Letters on Diorite
-Writing Chisel

V 0.1.1:
-Sandpaper (for erasing the letters)

V 0.2.0:
-24 Letters on Stone in Greek with tone marker
-24 Letters on Sandstone in Greek with tone marker
-24 Letters on Andesite in Greek with tone marker
-24 Letters on Granite in Greek with tone marker
-24 Letters on Diorite in Greek with tone marker
-Greek Writing Chisel

WIP:
-The Anglo-Saxon Futhark
